name: coolify
description: Control Coolify Cloud and self-hosted Coolify instances from Codex with API-aware skills and an MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Control Coolify Cloud or self-hosted Coolify through its API.
interface.longDescription: Operate Coolify Cloud or a self-hosted Coolify instance from Codex with a focused workflow skill and a local MCP server for projects, servers, applications, services, databases, deployments, environment variables, logs, teams, and any current Coolify API endpoint through a raw request escape hatch backed by the official OpenAPI spec.
defaultPrompt: Set the plugin up and connect to my Coolify instance.
Deploy a Coolify application and follow its logs.
Create or update Coolify environment variables safely.
